global.description: The ad features a full canvas background with the 'EarnPath' logo positioned at the top left. The central focus includes a prominent headline stating 'Save with confidence' followed by body text that reads 'Built for peace of mind'. A call to action, 'Try for free', is located at the bottom center. The layout incorporates geometric shapes as decorative elements, enhancing the visual appeal without overwhelming the main message.
global.visual_style: Modern design with geometric elements and a clean layout
global.main_message: Encouraging users to invest with confidence and peace of mind

elements.label: EarnPath text logo
elements.description: The logo of the EarnPath app, displayed in the top left corner of the ad.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: Supporting descriptive text below the headline.

elements.label: Call to Action
elements.description: A button with action text located at the bottom of the crop.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A crop showing a circle and a rectangle in a purple background, positioned towards the left side of the crop.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A combination of a circle and a rectangle in a purple background, positioned centrally within the crop.

elements.label: Segmented crop
elements.description: A plain purple rectangular area without any visible text or identifiable elements.

embedding_texts.global_text: Mobile ad for EarnPath Invest promoting confidence in saving and investing.
